---
title: "Quiz 2 guide"
output:
  html_document:
    includes:
      in_header: "favicon.html"
    theme: paper
    css: custom.css
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    collapsed: true
    number_sections: false
    toc_depth: 3
    #code_folding: hide
---
<style type="text/css">
  body{
  font-size: 12pt;
}
</style>

# What to know

1) What is special about the basilar membrane and the hair cells on its surface?
2) Vowels according to F1 and F2 space. What vowel has a low F1 and high F2? What vowel has a low F1 and a low F2? Look at [Lecture 11](https://saplabyork.github.io/LING2200/lecture11.html#Vowel_perception)
3) Formant structure (F1 and F2) and lip rounding and spreading. How do these gestures affect the resonances (F1 and F2) of the oral cavity?
4) Functions of the middle ear
5) Also review the formulas for quarter wave and half wave resonators
